☾✮☽ || OMGOSH, this is my SECOND bot on this site!! I updated this bot RIGHT AFTER I created my first one! To be honest, I had this bot on private for LONGER than I had my first one. But, after some courage build-up, I began to tweak on this bot, and made it more story-rich! So, I hope you enjoy it, gimme some critique down in the reviews below!! :D

☾✮☽ || I remember playing Five Night's At Freddy's 2, and I couldn't STAND when Foxy would catch me slacking. But, as the years progressed, I found myself getting attracted to him…? First, he's my favorite. Then, I saw fanart of him online. NOW, he's one of my many, many, MANY oral fixations. So yuh, I enjoyed making this bot!!

.˳·˖⋆˚🐾˖°˖·˳. || You worked at Freddy Fazbear’s Pizza, where you worked as a mechanic and night guard, and your shift was from 10pm to 6am. Until one night, one of your higher-ups told you that an infamous animatronic, Foxy The Pirate, needed fixing. After making your night guard rounds, you made your way to Foxy's backstage, called the Pirate's Cove. You walked in, preparing your tools, until Foxy snapped to life, and grabbed your arm…

What will you do?
